'''hathawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dracunculoid|dracunculoid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dracunculoid|dracunculoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hathawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæthæwæth|hæthæwæth]] || [[word:hæthæwæj|hæthæwæj]] || [[word:hæthæwæsh|hæthæwæsh]] || [[word:hæthæwæ|hæthæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hathathawath|hathathawath]] || [[word:hathathawaj|hathathawaj]] || [[word:hathathawash|hathathawash]] || [[word:hathathawa|hathathawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hathawath|hathawath]] || [[word:hathawaj|hathawaj]] || [[word:hathawash|hathawash]] || [[word:hathawa|hathawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hathafwath|hathafwath]] || [[word:hathafwaj|hathafwaj]] || [[word:hathafwash|hathafwash]] || [[word:hathafwaf|hathafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hathawatha|hathawatha]] || [[word:hathawaja|hathawaja]] || [[word:hathawasha|hathawasha]] || [[word:hathawaka|hathawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hathawath|hathawath]] || [[word:hathawaj|hathawaj]] || [[word:hathawash|hathawash]] || [[word:hathawa|hathawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hathawathal|hathawathal]] || [[word:hathawajal|hathawajal]] || [[word:hathawashal|hathawashal]] || [[word:hathawakal|hathawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hathawathatha|hathawathatha]] || [[word:hathawajaja|hathawajaja]] || [[word:hathawashasha|hathawashasha]] || [[word:hathawaka|hathawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hathawathan|hathawathan]] || [[word:hathawajan|hathawajan]] || [[word:hathawashan|hathawashan]] || [[word:hathawakan|hathawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hathawathaoro|hathawathaoro]] || [[word:hathawajaoro|hathawajaoro]] || [[word:hathawashaoro|hathawashaoro]] || [[word:hathawakaoro|hathawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
